sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; function FreelancerProfile() { const freelancer = { name: "Rahul Patil", title: "Full Stack Web Developer", location: "Nashik, Maharashtra", hourlyRate: "₹800 / hr", about: "I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience in building modern web applications. Specializing in React, Node.js, and UI/UX design, I help clients turn ideas into successful digital products.", skills: ["React.js", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Tailwind CSS", "Figma", "JavaScript", "Python"], experience: [ { year: "2023 - Present", role: "Senior Freelancer", company: "Upwork / Global Clients" }, { year: "2022 - 2023", role: "Web Intern", company: "Tech Nashik Solutions" } ], // 1. Portfolio Projects with Images projects: [ { name: "E-commerce Platform", desc: "A full online store with payment integration.", tech: "MERN Stack", img: "https://freepik.com" }, { name: "SaaS Dashboard", desc: "Real-time analytics for business management.", tech: "React & Firebase", img: "https://freepik.com" } ], // 2. Client Reviews reviews: [ { client: "Amit Sharma", comment: "Rahul delivered the project on time. His coding skills are top-notch!", stars: 5 }, { client: "Sanjana Rao", comment: "Very professional and easy to work with. Highly recommended!", stars: 5 } ] }; return (
{/* Header Background */}
{/* LEFT SIDE: Profile Card & Inquiry Form */}

{freelancer.name}

{freelancer.title}

15+
Jobs
4.9/5
Rating
{/* 3. Hire Me Form Integration */}
Quick Inquiry
{/* RIGHT SIDE: Content */}
{/* Bio */}

Professional Bio

{freelancer.about}

Expected Rate: {freelancer.hourlyRate}
{/* Core Skills */}

Core Skills

{freelancer.skills.map((skill, index) => ( {skill} ))}
{/* Portfolio Section with Images */}

Project Portfolio

{freelancer.projects.map((project, index) => (
{project.name}

{project.desc}

{project.tech}
))}
{/* Client Reviews */}

Client Feedback

{freelancer.reviews.map((rev, index) => (
{"⭐".repeat(rev.stars)}

"{rev.comment}"

- {rev.client}
))}
{/* 4. WhatsApp Floating Button Integration */}
); } export default FreelancerProfile;
